events.title: Allied Invasion of Iran
events.detail: Britain and USSR invade Iran to secure oil fields and supply lines. Reza Shah abdicates; his son Mohammad Reza Pahlavi takes the throne.

events.title: CIA Coup (Op. Ajax)
events.detail: CIA and MI6 overthrow PM Mossadegh after he nationalized oil. ~300 killed. Shah consolidated power. CIA acknowledged role in 2013.

events.title: Islamic Revolution
events.detail: Shah flees Jan 16. Khomeini returns Feb 1. Nov 4: Students seize US Embassy; 52 hostages held 444 days. Failed rescue kills 8 US troops.

events.title: Iran-Iraq War
events.detail: Iraq invades Iran; US provides intelligence to Iraq. ~1 million killed total. Chemical weapons used extensively by Iraq.

events.title: Iran Air 655
events.detail: USS Vincennes shoots down civilian Airbus A300 over Strait of Hormuz. All 290 killed including 66 children. US paid $131.8M settlement, never apologized.

events.title: Axis of Evil / Facilities Revealed
events.detail: Bush names Iran in "Axis of Evil." Exile group reveals secret nuclear facilities at Natanz and Arak.

events.title: JCPOA Nuclear Deal
events.detail: Iran agrees to reduce enriched uranium by 97%, limit enrichment to 3.67%, reduce centrifuges by two-thirds, allow IAEA inspections.

events.title: Trump Exits JCPOA
events.detail: Trump withdraws from JCPOA despite IAEA confirming Iranian compliance. Reimposed "maximum pressure" sanctions. Iran begins exceeding JCPOA limits in 2019.

events.title: Soleimani Killed
events.detail: US drone strike at Baghdad airport kills IRGC Quds Force commander Soleimani and Iraqi PMF deputy al-Muhandis. Iran retaliates with missiles at Al Asad, wounding 110 US troops.

events.title: Oct 7 Attack & Gaza War
events.detail: Hamas attacks southern Israel, killing ~1,200. Israel invades Gaza. Regional escalation with Hezbollah, Houthis, and Iran-backed militias.

events.title: First Iran-Israel Exchange
events.detail: Israel bombs Iranian consulate in Damascus. Iran launches 170+ drones and 100+ ballistic missiles at Israel; ~99% intercepted. Israel strikes Isfahan.

events.title: Second Exchange
events.detail: Iran fires ballistic missiles at Israel. Israel destroys most of Iran's Russian-supplied S-300 air defense systems near Tehran.

events.title: Twelve-Day War
events.detail: Israel launches 200+ jets at 100+ targets. US enters with B-2 bombers. 600+ Iranians killed. IRGC chief Salami and nuclear scientists killed. Ceasefire June 24.

events.title: Protests Erupt
events.detail: Grand Bazaar shuts over rial collapse (1.44M/$1). Protests spread to 17 provinces. Inflation at 42–52%, food prices up 72%.

events.title: Protest Massacres
events.detail: Regime kills thousands. Death toll estimates range from 3,117 (govt) to 43,000 (ICHR). 26,541 detained. Internet blackout imposed.

events.title: Trump: "Armada"
events.detail: Trump announces USS Abraham Lincoln and destroyers heading to region. Largest buildup since 2003 Iraq invasion by Feb 19.

events.title: State of the Union
events.detail: Trump accuses Iran of nuclear weapons pursuit and developing missiles that can reach the US. Pentagon and intelligence community later contradict both claims.

events.title: STRIKES BEGIN
events.detail: Operation Epic Fury / Roaring Lion launches at 1:15 AM EST. 2,000+ strikes across Iran. Khamenei killed. 40+ senior officials eliminated. War expands to Gulf states, Lebanon, Iraq.
